response.global_analysis: The video features English dialogue from VTuber Gigi Murin and comedic skits involving Gremlin characters. The Gremlins speak very rapidly, and some dialogue is intentionally bleeped for comedic effect; I have transcribed these based on context and phonetic cues. The Reference JSON for the song 'Odyssey' was used to verify the lyrics during the ending montage, and unused lyrics were discarded. Relevant on-screen text, such as the truck logo, has been included. Timestamps are precisely synchronized with the vocal audio waveform.

subtitles.original: I'm Gigi Murin!
subtitles.english: I'm Gigi Murin!

subtitles.original: I used to be 14 years old in 8th grade, but now I'm not!
subtitles.english: I used to be 14 years old in 8th grade, but now I'm not!

subtitles.original: I'm a bit clumsy, crazy and silly, and I may not look it,
subtitles.english: I'm a bit clumsy, crazy and silly, and I may not look it,

subtitles.original: but actually, I'm a member of Hololive English Justice.
subtitles.english: but actually, I'm a member of Hololive English Justice.

subtitles.original: That's true.
subtitles.english: That's true.

subtitles.original: I literally call myself the Fister because I fister people with my big big power glyph,
subtitles.english: I literally call myself the Fister because I fister people with my big big power glyph,

subtitles.original: and the citizens don't really like that I call myself the Fister,
subtitles.english: and the citizens don't really like that I call myself the Fister,

subtitles.original: and I don't really know why.
subtitles.english: and I don't really know why.

subtitles.original: TWO GREMS AND A SHOEBOX
subtitles.english: TWO GREMS AND A SHOEBOX

subtitles.original: Literally called the Fister because I fister people, you know?
subtitles.english: Literally called the Fister because I fister people, you know?

subtitles.original: You know what I mean?
subtitles.english: You know what I mean?

subtitles.original: Today's the day of a very important Justice meeting,
subtitles.english: Today's the day of a very important Justice meeting,

subtitles.original: but I- I accidentally overslept!
subtitles.english: but I- I accidentally overslept!

subtitles.original: So I have to hurry up and...
subtitles.english: So I have to hurry up and...

subtitles.original: make sure to look both ways before crossing the road!
subtitles.english: make sure to look both ways before crossing the road!

subtitles.original: And go!
subtitles.english: And go!

subtitles.original: Ah!
subtitles.english: Ah!

subtitles.original: Gigi goes bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Gigi goes bye-bye!

subtitles.original: Ah! Ouch!
subtitles.english: Ah! Ouch!

subtitles.original: Who is that? That was so weird.
subtitles.english: Who is that? That was so weird.

subtitles.original: Wow! Where am I?
subtitles.english: Wow! Where am I?

subtitles.original: Beautiful 2D fantasy world!
subtitles.english: Beautiful 2D fantasy world!

subtitles.original: I'm so efficient at doing things in my car...
subtitles.english: I'm so efficient at doing things in my car...

subtitles.original: Hit them with a car and it'd be really cool... what the...?
subtitles.english: Hit them with a car and it'd be really cool... what the...?

subtitles.original: A horse? That's not a truck.
subtitles.english: A horse? That's not a truck.

subtitles.original: That's dangerous! I could have died!
subtitles.english: That's dangerous! I could have died!

subtitles.original: But phew! That Grem sure knows how to drive.
subtitles.english: But phew! That Grem sure knows how to drive.

subtitles.original: Gremlin Justi-
subtitles.english: Gremlin Justi-

subtitles.original: Ah!
subtitles.english: Ah!

subtitles.original: Ugh... my body hurts.
subtitles.english: Ugh... my body hurts.

subtitles.original: I feel like I got run over by something, but I don't know what.
subtitles.english: I feel like I got run over by something, but I don't know what.

subtitles.original: Oh! Is that a statue of a Grem? Looks cool.
subtitles.english: Oh! Is that a statue of a Grem? Looks cool.

subtitles.original: Wait a second... I know this!
subtitles.english: Wait a second... I know this!

subtitles.original: I've been Isekai'd!
subtitles.english: I've been Isekai'd!

subtitles.original: What the freak! Gigi, you're here too?
subtitles.english: What the freak! Gigi, you're here too?

subtitles.original: This Justice cardboard...
subtitles.english: This Justice cardboard...

subtitles.original: Gigi, what's going on? Where are we?
subtitles.english: Gigi, what's going on? Where are we?

subtitles.original: What are you guys doing? Why are you cardboard?
subtitles.english: What are you guys doing? Why are you cardboard?

subtitles.original: Why does Cece look so sad?
subtitles.english: Why does Cece look so sad?

subtitles.original: You f***ing h**! How dare you do this to me!
subtitles.english: You f***ing h**! How dare you do this to me!

subtitles.original: You b***h! This is your fault somehow!
subtitles.english: You b***h! This is your fault somehow!

subtitles.original: I don't know how you did this, you absolute little d***head! Oh, you look terrible!
subtitles.english: I don't know how you did this, you absolute little d***head! Oh, you look terrible!

subtitles.original: Well, let's go investigate around here!
subtitles.english: Well, let's go investigate around here!

subtitles.original: Let's go! Okay! I'm on my way!
subtitles.english: Let's go! Okay! I'm on my way!

subtitles.original: Wait, guys! Wait for me!
subtitles.english: Wait, guys! Wait for me!

subtitles.original: We can have an adventure together! It'll be so fun and...
subtitles.english: We can have an adventure together! It'll be so fun and...

subtitles.original: Wait, wait! What's going on?
subtitles.english: Wait, wait! What's going on?

subtitles.original: Ahhhhh!
subtitles.english: Ahhhhh!

subtitles.original: Horses!
subtitles.english: Horses!

subtitles.original: Two of them!
subtitles.english: Two of them!

subtitles.original: Ahhhhh!
subtitles.english: Ahhhhh!

subtitles.original: Goodbye,
subtitles.english: Goodbye,

subtitles.original: leaving heartbreak of the past behind
subtitles.english: leaving heartbreak of the past behind
